hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”；【CRYPTO】分析师称，随着创纪录的 ETF 流出和 60% 的加息概率，比特币跌幅扩大，表明反弹背后存在结构性裂缝；【FINANCE】沃伦·巴菲特 (Warren巴菲特) 在 3 月份向 CNBC 戏称这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点。

items.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.summary: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”
items.summary_zh: 随着通胀飙升和国债收益率飙升，沃什可能会面对没有心情放松政策的联邦公开市场委员会。

items.title: Bitcoin slide extends as record ETF outflows and 60% rate-hike probability signal structural cracks beneath the rally: analysts
items.summary: Bitcoin fell to $76,700 amid the largest spot ETF outflows since January, thin spot volume, rising rate-hike bets, and unwinding leverage.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，随着创纪录的 ETF 流出和 60% 的加息概率，比特币跌幅扩大，表明反弹背后存在结构性裂缝
items.summary_zh: 比特币跌至 76,700 美元，原因是 1 月份以来最大的现货 ETF 流出、现货成交量清淡、加息押注增加以及杠杆解除。

items.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
items.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特 (Warren巴菲特) 在 3 月份向 CNBC 戏称这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点
items.summary_zh: 三月份，当被问及伯克希尔是否仍在投入资金时，巴菲特表示，该集团已经进行了“一笔小额收购”。

items.title: Senator Elizabeth Warren accuses U.S. regulator of approving unqualified crypto banks
items.summary: The Senate Banking Committee's top Democrat sent a letter to the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency questioning the charters of nine crypto firms.
items.title_zh: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦指责美国监管机构批准不合格的加密货币银行
items.summary_zh: 参议院银行委员会的民主党高层致函货币监理署，对九家加密货币公司的章程提出质疑。

items.title: Senator Warren criticizes OCC over Ripple, Coinbase and other crypto trust charters
items.summary: Last year, the OCC granted conditional approvals to Circle, Ripple, BitGo, Fidelity, and Paxos, as well as other firms more recently.
items.title_zh: Warren 参议员就 Ripple、Coinbase 和其他加密货币信托章程批评 OCC
items.summary_zh: 去年，OCC 向 Circle、Ripple、BitGo、Fidelity 和 Paxos 以及最近的其他公司授予了有条件批准。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
items.summary: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行将削减超过 15% 的企业职能职位，以实现更高回报
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行将削减企业职能，并计划到 2028 年将每位员工的收入增加 20% 以上，以寻求更强劲的回报。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.
items.title_zh: 英伟达财报电话大戏：习近平峰会后黄仁勋会谈论“特朗普”和中国芯片吗？
items.summary_zh: 英伟达的盈利及其对财务报告的评论预计将成为美国股市的重大考验。

items.summary_zh: 寻找HALO股票是股市的热门话题。现在有一个ETF可以投资它。

items.title: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
items.summary: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.
items.title_zh: 世卫组织医生警告说，埃博拉疫情的传播速度可能比最初想象的要快
items.summary_zh: 中部非洲疑似有数百起病例，但专家担心实际数字可能要高得多。

items.title: Trump Says He Postponed a ‘Very Major Attack’ on Iran, Leaving Mideast on Edge
items.summary: President Trump threatened “another big hit” on Iran, saying the country had days to return to the negotiating table, as Pakistan continued its mediation efforts to end the war.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他推迟了对伊朗的“非常重大的袭击”，让中东陷入紧张状态
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统威胁要对伊朗进行“又一次重大打击”，称伊朗有几天时间重返谈判桌，而巴基斯坦则继续为结束战争进行斡旋努力。

items.title: As a Weakened Putin Follows Trump to Beijing, Iran War Offers an Opening
items.summary: With the upheaval in the Persian Gulf disrupting oil and gas supplies, Russia is looking to deepen its energy ties to China.
items.title_zh: 普京追随特朗普访问北京，伊朗战争提供了一个机会
items.summary_zh: 随着波斯湾的动荡扰乱了石油和天然气供应，俄罗斯正在寻求加深与中国的能源联系。

items.title: Israeli Minister Threatens to Evict Palestinians From West Bank Hamlet
items.summary: Bezalel Smotrich, the hard-line minister, said he was retaliating for the International Criminal Court prosecutor seeking his arrest, something the court did not confirm nor deny.

items.summary_zh: 强硬派部长贝扎雷尔·斯莫特里奇表示，他是在报复国际刑事法院检察官寻求逮捕他，但法院没有证实也没有否认这一点。

items.title: 21Shares says Hyperliquid ETF demand shows appetite for 24/7 trading
items.summary: 21Shares says strong early flows into its new Hyperliquid ETF reflect growing investor demand for around-the-clock access to crypto and traditional assets.

items.summary_zh: 21Shares 表示，其新的 Hyperliquid ETF 的早期资金流入强劲，反映出投资者对全天候获取加密货币和传统资产的需求不断增长。

items.title: CFTC sues Minnesota over first explicit state ban on prediction markets
items.summary: Minnesota’s law could expose exchanges, payment providers, media partners, and sports leagues to criminal liability.

items.title: The U.S. can’t lose the bitcoin race to China
items.summary: The next global power competition is not being fought over missiles alone. It’s being fought over money, and right now, China is moving aggressively to shape the future of it, argues Gooden.

items.summary_zh: 下一场全球权力竞争不仅仅围绕导弹展开。古登认为，这是为了金钱而展开的斗争，而现在，中国正在积极采取行动来塑造它的未来。

items.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.
items.title_zh: 为什么台湾成为特习会谈的决定性问题
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对台军售将列入他与中国国家主席习近平周五结束的会谈议程。

items.title: 'Ebola has tortured us': Fear grips eastern DR Congo as deadly virus spreads
items.summary: The health minister has acknowledged that medics are playing catch-up with the virus after being slow to detect it.
items.title_zh: “埃博拉折磨着我们”：随着致命病毒的传播，恐惧笼罩刚果民主共和国东部
items.summary_zh: 卫生部长承认，在检测速度较慢之后，医务人员正在追赶这种病毒。

items.title: Key people smuggler arrested after BBC uncovered identity
items.summary: The 28-year-old's network is thought to have transported thousands of illegal migrants into the UK.
items.title_zh: BBC 揭露身份后逮捕关键人口走私犯
items.summary_zh: 据信，这名 28 岁的人的网络已将数千名非法移民运送到英国。

items.title: Father-of-eight killed in San Diego mosque shooting hailed as hero
items.summary: Security guard Amin Abdullah, one of three killed in the attack, was described as "a shining light".
items.title_zh: 在圣地亚哥清真寺枪击事件中丧生的八个父亲被誉为英雄
items.summary_zh: 保安阿明·阿卜杜拉是袭击中丧生的三人之一，他被描述为“一道闪亮的光芒”。

items.title: Victim or enabler? Epstein girlfriend who could face questions despite plea deal
items.summary: Nadia Marcinko is relatively unknown but may soon be called before US legislators.
items.title_zh: 受害者还是推动者？尽管认罪协议，爱泼斯坦女友仍可能面临质疑
items.summary_zh: 纳迪亚·马辛科 (Nadia Marcinko) 相对不为人所知，但可能很快就会被传唤到美国立法者面前。

items.title: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
items.summary: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.
items.title_zh: 芒果老板儿子因父亲坠崖身亡被捕
items.summary_zh: 71 岁的伊萨克于 2024 年 12 月在巴塞罗那附近的蒙特塞拉特山脉散步时从峡谷坠落身亡。

items.title: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
items.summary: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.
items.title_zh: 卖儿求生：阿富汗父亲被迫做出不可能的选择
items.summary_zh: 如今，在阿富汗，有四分之三的人无法满足他们的基本需求。

items.title: Two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.summary: The two were among four divers located in the furthest chamber in the cave and their bodies were recovered by specialist divers.
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现两具失踪意大利人尸体
items.summary_zh: 这两人是位于洞穴最远房间的四名潜水员之一，他们的尸体被专业潜水员发现。

items.title: Uncontrolled California wildfires seen from space
items.summary: Some 750 firefighters are tackling the uncontrolled blazes supported by water-dropping helicopters.
items.title_zh: 从太空看到不受控制的加州野火
items.summary_zh: 约 750 名消防员在直升机洒水的帮助下扑灭失控的大火。

items.title: Jackson Pollock painting sells for record $181m at auction
items.summary: The Abstract Expressionist's Number 7A, 1948 painting is now his most expensive artwork ever sold at auction.
items.title_zh: 杰克逊·波洛克 (Jackson Pollock) 画作在拍卖会上以创纪录的 1.81 亿美元成交
items.summary_zh: 这位抽象表现主义画家 1948 年的 7A 号画作现在是他在拍卖会上售出的最昂贵的艺术品。

items.title: As Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Sites, an Environmental Disaster Unfolds
items.summary: After invading more than four years ago, Moscow has usually been the one causing ecological disaster. But Kyiv’s strikes, intended to cut into the Kremlin’s oil revenue, have flipped the script.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯石油基地，一场环境灾难上演
items.summary_zh: 在四年多前入侵之后，莫斯科通常是造成生态灾难的一方。但基辅旨在削减克里姆林宫石油收入的罢工却扭转了局面。

items.title: Ebola Outbreak in Central Africa Could Last Months, W.H.O. Says
items.summary: Health officials reported more than 130 suspected deaths and 513 cases, a sharp rise since the outbreak was identified on May 15 in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织：中部非洲的埃博拉疫情可能会持续数月说
items.summary_zh: 卫生官员报告了超过 130 例疑似死亡和 513 例病例，自 5 月 15 日在刚果民主共和国和乌干达发现疫情以来急剧增加。

items.title: Trump’s Portrait Pops Up on Rickshaws in India to Mark America’s 250th
items.summary: The president is popping up on the back of the iconic three-wheeler to kick off America’s 250th anniversary celebrations in India.
items.title_zh: 特朗普肖像出现在印度人力车上，纪念美国成立 250 周年
items.summary_zh: 总统突然出现在标志性三轮车的后面，为在印度举行的美国 250 周年庆祝活动拉开序幕。

items.title: Trump’s Special Envoy to Greenland Receives a Cold Welcome From Locals
items.summary: After President Trump’s threats to seize the island, Gov. Jeff Landry’s offers of MAGA hats and chocolate chip cookies fall flat.
items.title_zh: 特朗普格陵兰特使受到当地人冷遇
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统威胁要夺取该岛之后，州长杰夫·兰德里（Jeff Landry）提供的 MAGA 帽子和巧克力曲奇饼的提议落空了。

items.title: Oil Slick Reaches a Pristine Persian Gulf Island in Iran
items.summary: Videos show birds, turtles and crabs trapped inside mounds of tar around Shidvar island, a protected wildlife sanctuary with turquoise waters and white sand beaches.
items.title_zh: 浮油到达伊朗的一个原始波斯湾岛屿
items.summary_zh: 视频显示，鸟类、海龟和螃蟹被困在希德瓦尔岛周围的焦油堆中，希德瓦尔岛是一个受保护的野生动物保护区，拥有碧绿的海水和白色的沙滩。

items.title: Here’s How Iran Could Respond to Renewed U.S.-Israeli Strikes
items.summary: In any new round of fighting, Iranian officials could adopt new tactics, including intensified strikes on neighbors and trying to close off a second strait.
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何应对美国和以色列的新一轮袭击
items.summary_zh: 在任何新一轮的战斗中，伊朗官员都可能采取新的策略，包括加强对邻国的打击，并试图封锁第二条海峡。

items.title: Zapatero, Spain’s Former Leader, Investigated for Graft
items.summary: José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero, who led Spain from 2004 to 2011, is accused of influence peddling after he left office. He has denied wrongdoing.
items.title_zh: 西班牙前领导人萨帕特罗因贪污接受调查
items.summary_zh: 2004年至2011年领导西班牙的何塞·路易斯·罗德里格斯·萨帕特罗在离任后被指控以权谋私。他否认有不当行为。

items.title: Zerohash pursues new funding at more than $1.5 billion valuation after Mastercard drops investment plans
items.summary: Crypto infrastructure providers are drawing renewed investor interest as Wall Street deepens its push into digital assets.
items.title_zh: 万事达卡放弃投资计划后 Zerohash 以超过 15 亿美元的估值寻求新融资
items.summary_zh: 随着华尔街加大对数字资产的投入，加密货币基础设施提供商重新吸引了投资者的兴趣。

items.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE one of crypto’s most undervalued assets, says Bitwise
items.summary: The crypto asset manager argued the market is mispricing Hyperliquid as a niche derivatives exchange instead of a fast-growing “super-app” for global trading markets.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 表示，Hyperliquid 的 HYPE 是加密货币中最被低估的资产之一
items.summary_zh: 这位加密资产经理认为，市场将 Hyperliquid 错误定价为利基衍生品交易所，而不是全球交易市场快速增长的“超级应用程序”。

items.title: The SEC wants to let newly public companies raise cash instantly in its biggest rule change in decades
items.summary: The agency is proposing its largest overhaul of public listing rules in over 20 years, cutting compliance costs and giving crypto firms a much easier path to raise cash on Wall Street.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会希望让新上市公司立即筹集现金，这是数十年来最大的规则变化
items.summary_zh: 该机构正在提议对公开上市规则进行 20 多年来最大规模的改革，以降低合规成本，并为加密货币公司在华尔街筹集资金提供更容易的途径。

items.title: Polymarket unlocks $5 trillion private market for retail traders, previously reserved for elites
items.summary: Polymarket’s new private-company prediction markets let retail traders bet on startup milestones once reserved for Wall Street insiders.
items.title_zh: Polymarket 为零售交易者解锁了 5 万亿美元的私人市场，以前是为精英保留的
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的新私营公司预测市场让零售交易者可以押注曾经为华尔街内部人士保留的初创公司里程碑。

items.title: Crypto IPO boom stalls as AI frenzy reshapes tech markets, says Fundstrat exec
items.summary: Crypto firms are pausing long-awaited IPO plans as weak trading volumes and macro pressures weigh on valuations despite boom in AI-linked tech listings.
items.title_zh: Fundstrat 高管表示，随着人工智能狂热重塑科技市场，加密货币 IPO 热潮陷入停滞
items.summary_zh: 尽管与人工智能相关的科技上市蓬勃发展，但由于交易量疲软和宏观压力打压估值，加密货币公司正在暂停期待已久的 IPO 计划。

items.title: Deloitte absorbs Blocknative team as crypto infra firm winds down APIs and Gas Network
items.summary: The Blocknative website now returns a post noting that the firm is “now in the process of ceasing operations."
items.title_zh: 随着加密基础设施公司逐步关闭 API 和 Gas Network，德勤吸收了 Blocknative 团队
items.summary_zh: Blocknative 网站现在返回了一篇帖子，指出该公司“现在正在停止运营”。

items.title: Stablecoin infrastructure startup Checker raises $8 million from Galaxy Ventures and others
items.summary: Stablecoin infrastructure startup Checker has raised $8 million in funding from a range of investors including Galaxy and Framework.
items.title_zh: 稳定币基础设施初创公司 Checker 从 Galaxy Ventures 等公司筹集了 800 万美元
items.summary_zh: 稳定币基础设施初创公司 Checker 已从 Galaxy 和 Framework 等一系列投资者那里筹集了 800 万美元资金。

items.title: Polymarket rolls out prediction markets tracking IPOs, valuations for private companies like OpenAI and SpaceX
items.summary: Early offerings from the prediction market focus on AI, fintech and crypto unicorns including OpenAI, Anthropic, Stripe and Kraken.

items.summary_zh: 预测市场的早期产品主要集中在人工智能、金融科技和加密独角兽领域，包括 OpenAI、Anthropic、Stripe 和 Kraken。

items.title: Canaan posts $88.7 million Q1 net loss as revenue lands in line with guidance
items.summary: Canaan posted an $88.7 million net loss for the first quarter of 2026 despite meeting revenue guidance at $62.7 million.

items.summary_zh: 尽管达到了 6270 万美元的收入指引，但嘉楠耘智公布 2026 年第一季度净亏损 8870 万美元。

items.title: Wintermute enters DeFi vault space with Armitage, supporting ‘collateral types that other curators cannot’
items.summary: Vault curators allow institutions to take a hands-off approach to crypto by allocating capital along pre-set risk parameters.
items.title_zh: Wintermute 与 Armitage 一起进入 DeFi 金库领域，支持“其他管理者无法提供的抵押品类型”
items.summary_zh: 金库管理者允许机构按照预设的风险参数分配资本，从而对加密货币采取不干涉的态度。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.

items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

items.summary_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中为美国 Pro 用户预览全新的个人财务体验。安全地连接您的财务账户，并获得基于您的财务背景、目标和优先事项的人工智能见解和指导。

items.title: I/O 2026

items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.summary: Introducing a $100 AI Ultra plan — plus, new features and benefits for Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers.

items.summary_zh: 推出 100 美元的 AI Ultra 计划，此外，还为 Google AI Plus、Pro 和 Ultra 订阅者提供新功能和福利。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育项目首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
